issues.description: Valid quoted YAML enum values are treated as invalid, so a spec like tier: "lightweight" / verificationMode: "dedicated-sessions" silently falls back to full / out-of-band-or-none, hiding both the lw marker and the + fraction. Location: src/utils/fileSystem.ts, parseSessionSetConfig (stringRe / tier / verificationMode parsing). Fix: accept optional single/double quotes around scalar enum values before validation, and add coverage for quoted tier + quoted verificationMode in src/test/suite/tierLegibility.test.ts.
issues.verificationMethod: Static review of the stringRe regex ([\w-]+ cannot match a quoted scalar) against the YAML spec shapes the triStateRe already accepts in quoted form.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: tierLegibility.test.ts: parseSessionSetConfig on a spec with tier: "lightweight" and verificationMode: "dedicated-sessions" (double- and single-quoted) returns the quoted values, not the defaults.
issues.resolution_notes: stringRe now accepts optional single/double quotes ((?:"([\w-]+)"|'([\w-]+)'|([\w-]+))) with a stringValue capture-picker; all three call sites (uatScope, tier, verificationMode) updated; 4 quoted-value tests added (double, single, quoted+comment, quoted-invalid-defaults). Round-2 gpt-5-4 re-verify: VERIFIED.
